source: Derived from config/skills.json post-audit + OpenRouter catalog validation
description: Maps the 50 persona codes to 8 OpenClaw isolated agents. Each agent has a fixed model (OpenClaw 2026.4.5 does not support per-call --model override on openclaw agent CLI, only cron jobs). Personas within the same agent share a model per this mapping but retain their distinct system_prompts from skills.json, injected via --message at invocation time.
notes: Relaxations vs audit: LEGAL moves from mistral-large-2411 to grok-4.1-fast (cheaper, competitive LegalBench). FORGE/SWIFT/DEPLOY move from qwen3-coder:free to minimax-m2.5:free (MiniMax 80.2% SWE-bench > Qwen Coder 66.5%, actual improvement). BENCHMARKER/TENDENCIA move from gpt-oss-120b:free to stepfun-flash:free (downgrade). METRICS moves from deepseek-v3.2 to stepfun-flash:free (downgrade, deepseek was stronger reasoner). DEEP-RESEARCH moves from gemini-2.5-flash to stepfun-flash:free (significant downgrade, flash had GPQA 82.8%). SPLIT moves from llama-3.3-70b:free to stepfun-flash:free (sidegrade). FACTURA/COBRO move from mistral-small-3.2 to stepfun-flash:free (sidegrade, both cheap). AI-MONITOR moves from llama3.1:8b to qwen3:8b (minor, both local 8B).

Cost impact: Total monthly cost drops from $57.42 (audit) to ~$46 due to free-tier consolidation of previously-paid personas (METRICS, DEEP-RESEARCH, FACTURA, COBRO, LEGAL). Quality relaxations noted above should be monitored; promote problematic agents to paid tier (e.g., cheap-misc → deepseek/deepseek-v3.2) if quality insufficient.
Model IDs verified against OpenRouter API on 2026-04-08.

grok.description: Workhorse cheap paid for sales, ops, legal (Grok 4.1 Fast)

qwen-free.description: Free 80b general reasoning for finance/ops (Qwen 3 Next 80B)

code-free.description: Free SWE-bench leader for code generation (MiniMax M2.5)

gemini-lite.description: Cheap general purpose for onboarding/comms (Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite)

cheap-misc.description: Free tool-calling for routing/templates/research (Stepfun Step-3.5 Flash)

local-vision.description: Local multimodal for image/vision tasks (Gemma 4 E4B)
